title: Second boy, 14, arrested for allegedly robbing South Boston lemonade stand
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Crime The boys are accused of robbing a lemonade stand, where one suspect allegedly displayed what appeared to be a firearm before stealing the money from the cash box.
South Boston residents Jenn and David Byrne are the parents of the two children who say their lemonade stand was robbed June 10.
Ariela Lopez for The Boston Globe A second suspect accused of robbing a South Boston lemonade stand last month has been taken into custody, authorities announced.

title: Rhode Island couple unexpectedly become parents while on vacation in Florida
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Local News The couple was preparing to set sail on a cruise when they got the surprise of a lifetime: they were going to be parents.
By Darin Zullo July 19, 2026 | 9:14 AM 1 minute to read While on vacation in Florida, a Rhode Island couple picked up an unexpected souvenir — a new family member.
Lauren Siwinski and Gary Glenn had just arrived in the Tampa Bay area to set sail on a cruise when Siwinski began experiencing severe abdominal pain, HCA Florida Brandon Hospital said on Facebook.

title: Juvenile humpback whale washes ashore in Winthrop
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Local News An investigation is underway into the death of the young whale, which was discovered lodged under a private dock on Wednesday.
Animal stranding response crews inspect a 35,000-pound humpback whale that washed up stuck under a private dock in Winthrop on Wednesday.
Whale & Dolphin Conservation USA A juvenile humpback whale washed ashore and became lodged beneath a dock in Winthrop on Wednesday, prompting an investigation by marine rescue officials.

title: Jahmai Jones hits memorable first home run for Red Sox
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Boston Red Sox In front of the Fenway Crowd, Jones launched a two-run homer over the Green Monster Saturday.
Boston Red Sox's Jahmai Jones celebrates after his two-run home run in the second inning of a baseball game against the Tampa Bay Rays, Saturday, July 18, 2026, in Boston.
(AP Photo/Charles Krupa) Jahmai Jones hasn’t been in Boston very long, but he’s making quite the first impression.
